title: Reviewer numbered-findings enumeration
description:
Make the code review enumerate every finding in one pass so issues surface together rather than round by round.

## Background

The code-review gate prompt does not require an exhaustive enumeration, so findings dribble out across successive review rounds. The prompt lives in the ai-review gate scripts.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-09: the code-review gate prompt requires a single numbered enumeration of all findings across all categories with an explicit total count.

## Notes

Edit the ai-review gate prompt copies; self-contained. Instruct the reviewer to emit, in one pass, a numbered enumeration of every finding across all categories with an explicit total count.
